calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-10-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JASON I. BLUVER OF THE GARTENBERG, GELFAND HAYTON & SELDEN LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 542-2020 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PASTA POMODORO, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss Complaint of Dino Turano is denied. Plaintiff has leave to file the amended complaint by September 16, 2014. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2014 Continued To Sep-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Continued To Aug-13-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. EDWARD GARTENBERG OF GARTENBERG GELFAND HAYTON & SELDEN LLP, TEL. NO. (213) 542-2100 EXT. 2111 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT PASTA POMODORO BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PASTA POMODORO, INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM FOR PUNITVE DAMAGES is Granted with 20 days leave to amend. Punitive damages are available "[i]n an action for the breach of an obligation not arising from contract." (CCP sec. 3294(a).) As pled, the fraud in the inducement cause of action arises from the termination of Plaintiff's employment contract. (See Hine v. Dittrich (1991) 228 Cal.App.3d 59, 65, "[a]s long as the alleged injury would not have occurred but for the employment termination'the employee is generally limited to a contractual remedy.") Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/EG

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jun-16-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT PASTA POMODORO, INC's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to June 16, 2014, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The court previously continued the matter to obtain a courtesy copy of the moving papers. The moving party provided a courtesy copy of the reply brief, however. The court now has two copies of the reply brief and no copy of the moving paper. Please provide a copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT PASTA POMODORO, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT is continued to June 2, 2014, to give the moving party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Please immediately deliver a courtesy copy of the moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. The Court has the opposing and reply papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
